hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^rm\s+-rf\s+/'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot rm -rf from root directory' >&2; exit 2; fi; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read file_path; if echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.(env|secret|key|pem)$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot modify sensitive files' >&2; exit 2; fi; }

_comments.hooks: Adapted from .codex hooks for Claude Code
